original_text:
### Brand Name & Trademark Usage
- Always write **LISRAYA** in ALL CAPS in all written materials (patient marketing rule; supersedes the Feb 2026 general guide's title-case rule).
- Include the **® registered trademark symbol only when the generic name is included** — i.e., LISRAYA® (brepocitinib). Apply on **first/most prominent mention only**, in **external-facing documents only**. Do not repeat ® on subsequent mentions.
- Generic name format: lowercase, in parentheses: `(brepocitinib)`.
- Parent company: Priovant Therapeutics, Inc. (sign-off lives in the locked footer — do not add it in sections).

relations.note: Both govern correct rendering of the LISRAYA brand name string within copy.

quotes: Always write **LISRAYA** in ALL CAPS in all written materials
Always write **LISRAYA** in ALL CAPS in all written materials (patient marketing rule; supersedes the Feb 2026 general guide's title-case rule).

rules.intent: Lock current brand-name casing and clarify precedence over an outdated title-case guideline.
rules.rule_text: In all patient marketing materials, the brand name must be written LISRAYA in ALL CAPS (brand_name.case = all_caps). This patient-marketing rule supersedes the earlier general-guide instruction to use title case for the brand name.

quotes: Include the **® registered trademark symbol only when the generic name is included**
Apply on **first/most prominent mention only**, in **external-facing documents only**. Do not repeat ® on subsequent mentions.
Generic name format: lowercase, in parentheses: `(brepocitinib)`.

rules.intent: Ensure correct, legally required pairing and frequency of the trademark symbol with the generic drug name.
rules.rule_text: The ® registered trademark symbol may only be used alongside the generic name — e.g., LISRAYA® (brepocitinib) — and only on the first/most prominent mention in external-facing documents; do not repeat ® on subsequent mentions.

quotes: sign-off lives in the locked footer — do not add it in sections
Parent company: Priovant Therapeutics, Inc. (sign-off lives in the locked footer — do not add it in sections).

rules.intent: Keep legal parent-company attribution confined to the single locked footer location for consistency and compliance.
rules.rule_text: The parent company sign-off (Priovant Therapeutics, Inc.) belongs exclusively in the locked footer/end matter; it must not be added into body sections.
